title: Selling Online Without Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in a country where PayPal is blocked, or your bank requires you to jump through hoops to use Stripe. You've tried Gumroad, but its limitations have held you back. How do you sell your ebooks, courses, or software without breaking a sweat? You've come to the right place. In this post, we'll break down the options and help you find a solution that works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad, Payhip, and other platforms claim to be 'creator-friendly,' but they come with significant restrictions. They often require a Stripe or PayPal account, which can be a deal-breaker if you're in a country where these services are blocked. Even when you can use them, these platforms charge hefty fees and take a significant cut of your earnings. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle provides a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard, all in one payment. With this solution, you can sell your digital products without any of the hassle or restrictions.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, the big platforms fall short. PayPal is blocked in many countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe has its own set of limitations, and even when you can use it, the fees are steep. Gumroad and Payhip follow suit, often requiring a PayPal or Stripe account to function. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle uses NOWPayments as its payment processor, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies and doesn't require any KYC or buyer account setup. This means you can sell your digital products to customers in restricted countries without worrying about access issues.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed and fees, the big platforms often leave a lot to be desired. PayPal's fees can range from 2.9% to 4.4% depending on the country, and Stripe's fees start at 2.9% + 30¢ per transaction. Gumroad and Payhip follow a similar pattern, often taking a significant cut of your earnings. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle uses NOWPayments, which has zero fees for the creator. This means you get to keep 100% of your earnings, minus the cost of the Full Stack Bundle itself.
PayPal's restrictions are just the beginning – many other payment processors follow suit.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery, the Full Stack Bundle stands head and shoulders above the competition. With the Core Engine, you can automate the delivery of your digital products, including ebooks, courses, and software. The Wallet Connect feature allows customers to purchase with their favorite cryptocurrencies, and the Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management. This means you can focus on creating more digital products, while the Full Stack Bundle takes care of the rest.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're tired of the hassle and restrictions of Gumroad, Payhip, and other platforms, the Full Stack Bundle is the clear choice. With its complete store infrastructure, zero fees, and automation capabilities, you can sell your digital products without breaking a sweat. Whether you're in a restricted country or just looking for a better way to sell your digital wares, the Full Stack Bundle has got you covered.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
The Full Stack Bundle is the ultimate solution for creators in restricted countries, offering a complete store infrastructure and zero fees.

Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
With the Full Stack Bundle, you can automate delivery, manage orders, and track analytics in real-time – no manual intervention required.
